name: Donia Pulse AI — Arcee Workflow v2.1 (Supabase)

nodes.name: 🟢 Fetch Client Config (Supabase)
nodes.notes: Uses Supabase REST (PostgREST). Looks up the client row by phone_number_id. Returns a JSON array (0 or 1 row).

nodes.name: 🤖 Arcee AI
nodes.notes: Calls Arcee API — OpenAI-compatible format. Model configurable per client in Firebase.

nodes.name: 🟢 Save Conversation (Supabase)
nodes.notes: Inserts one row into the Supabase 'conversations' table via PostgREST.

env_variables_in_n8n.SUPABASE_URL: رابط مشروعك في Supabase، مثال: https://xxxxx.supabase.co
env_variables_in_n8n.SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY: Service Role Key من Supabase → Settings → API

SETUP_GUIDE.notes: هذا الإصدار v2.1 يستعمل Supabase REST (PostgREST) بدل Firebase. لا حاجة لأي SDK، فقط طلبات HTTP عادية.
